# Torah && Tech

> Torah && Tech is a book exploring the intersection of Jewish ethics, Torah wisdom, and modern technology. Written by Ben Greenberg and Yechiel Kalmenson. ISBN: 978-1735021706.

Torah && Tech brings more than three millennia of Jewish insights and wisdom to bear on technology topics including artificial intelligence, code ownership, object-oriented design, social media ethics, and more. The book grew out of a weekly newsletter and is designed as a conversation starter, not a monologue.

## Key Topics

- Jewish ethics applied to artificial intelligence
- Torah perspectives on code ownership and intellectual property
- Object-oriented design through the lens of Torah wisdom
- Social media's impact on interpersonal relationships and community
- The intersection of ancient wisdom and modern innovation

## Authors

- [Ben Greenberg](https://www.bengreenberg.dev): Software developer and rabbi
- [Yechiel Kalmenson](https://yechiel.me): Software developer and rabbi

## Buy the Book

- [Amazon Kindle](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B088NNRZ85): E-book edition
- [Amazon Paperback](https://www.amazon.com/dp/1735021709): US paperback
- [Book Depository](https://www.bookdepository.com/Torah--Tech-Discussions-at-the-Intersection-of-Torah-and-Technology-Yechiel-Kalmenson-Ben-Greenberg/9781735021706): International paperback
